plugins.name: codex-delegation
plugins.description: Delegate second-tier work to Codex CLI (gpt-5.6 top tier, gpt-5.5 bulk) — model-routing rubric, Workflow/Agent fan-out wrappers, computer-use verification. Requires the openai-codex plugin.

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: General-purpose personal skills — code-style (personal code taste) and future everyday skills. Install at user scope only.
